summary: Business Insider reported Snowflake made targeted cuts affecting its technical writing and documentation team as the company emphasized long-term strategy, operational efficiency, and more AI product investment.
evidenceQuote: Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy previously told Business Insider that the company is focusing on becoming more operationally efficient while building more AI products.
notes: Snowflake did not disclose a layoff total and declined to specify every affected team, but BI reported the cuts hit technical writing and documentation. This is a solid AI-adjacent restructuring case rather than a direct AI-replacement admission.

sources.name: Business Insider
sources.quote: Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy previously told Business Insider that the company is focusing on becoming more operationally efficient while building more AI products.
